content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed diff and key implementation files (src/contexts/milestone_record/bundle.rs, template_catalog.rs, tests). The changes are additive: new workstream/dependency helpers (infer_workstream_order, validate_dependency_graph, summarize_bundle), cycle detection wired into validate(), plan.md Summary/Dependency Graph/Deferred Items sections, and an enhanced milestone-bundle prompt template. Cycle detection uses a standard 3-color DFS that correctly identifies back edges. Private expect() on canonicalized bead_id is safe because every caller goes through canonicalize_bundle/validated_canonical_bundle. Acceptance coverage uses checked_mul/checked_div so total_acceptance_criteria=0 yields 0% rather than panicking. summarize_bundle's fall-back clone path routes through dependency_graph_analysis (which re-canonicalizes) rather than the canonical-only helper, so there is no panic risk on invalid input (just dependency_depth=0). bead_reference_aliases correctly disambiguates short/qualified forms and drops ambiguous aliases. All 1019 lib tests and 29 template_catalog tests pass; cargo fmt --check and cargo clippy --lib -D warnings are clean; pre-existing clippy errors in unrelated test files exist on baseline and are not introduced by this change. No correctness, safety, or robustness issues within bead scope.

## Amendments

None.
